questions: how to be a good parent
answers: Parenting basics: be patient, listen to your child, set boundaries with love, spend quality time, and lead by example. No parent is perfect!
For new parents: sleep when baby sleeps, don't compare with others, ask for help, and trust your instincts. You're doing better than you think.
Child development tip: read to your kids daily, limit screen time, encourage curiosity, let them play freely, and praise effort not just results.
Recommended books: "The Whole-Brain Child", "How to Talk So Kids Will Listen", "Parenting with Love and Logic". Great for all ages!
